_description: Auto-regenerates .claude/codemap.md on file writes and session start. Python projects only. Auto-detects uv.
_install_notes: Bootstrap first: python3 scripts/generate_codemap.py . --force  (or: uv run python scripts/generate_codemap.py . --force)

hooks.command: [ -f scripts/generate_codemap.py ] && { if [ -f uv.lock ] && command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv run python scripts/generate_codemap.py . --trigger-file "$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; else python3 scripts/generate_codemap.py . --trigger-file "$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; fi; } || true

[ -f scripts/generate_codemap.py ] && { if [ -f uv.lock ] && command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv run python scripts/generate_codemap.py . --force; else python3 scripts/generate_codemap.py . --force; fi; } || true
